name: research-toolkit
description: Relentless self-reflexive dialectical thinking that questions its own premises. Investigation protocols (DIP, cui-bono), epistemic depth (text-deconstruction, negative-dialectical-spiral), dialectic testing, frame rotation, iterative verification, video/substack extraction. STONK agent composes cui-bono with financial MCPs for investment analysis. Includes financial-mcp, portfolio-mcp, transparency-mcp.
